title: araucaria araucana var. aurea
intro: Araucaria araucana var. aurea, also known as the gold or yellow monkey puzzle tree, is a variety of the monkey puzzle tree that is native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The health benefits of Araucaria araucana var. aurea include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and seeds of the plant are typically harvested and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
